title: taraxacum bithynicum
intro: Taraxacum bithynicum, also known as Bithynian dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney issues due to its diuretic and choleretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum bithynicum include its potential to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its usage and preparation may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
